prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Iron Kingdoms / Full Metal Fantasy inspired steampunk military-fantasy atlas for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant western Immoren-style continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago, mechanikal factory-cities, steam-vented ruins, blighted marshes, warjack assembly ports, arcane storm fronts, coal harbors, fortified rail termini, alchemist islands, mercenary freeports and rival kingdom naval bases.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated steampunk fantasy atlas, brass-and-iron cartographic overlay, aged parchment, steam plumes, mechanikal detail, arcane lightning, warjack smoke, industrial military fantasy mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands include tiny mechanik islets, refinery rocks, reef belts, large factory islands, crescent chains, coal ports and storm-scarred atolls; include brass compass rose, riveted border, rail and sea routes, factory icons, fortress markers and arcane storm symbols without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and varied in size and shape, with channels, oily lagoons, reefs, industrial ports, atolls, volcanic forge islands and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, smoky deltas, fjords, capes, blighted estuaries and fragmented cliffs; show snowbound northlands, river kingdoms, blighted swamps, mountain holds, forests, industrial basins and arcane-scorched wastelands.
Avoid: uniform island grid, clean heroic fantasy, simple round islands, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
